title: cymbopogon pleiarthron
intro: Cymbopogon pleiarthron, also known as East Indian lemon grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cymbopogon pleiarthron include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cold. Cymbopogon pleiarthron is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, relieve respiratory issues, and promote overall well-being.
